samples.user_query: Kids gymnastics programs near me
samples.assistant_text: Flips for Fun Gymnastics at 955 Kiowa Ave is your spot — they're open Mon–Fri 3pm–8pm, and you can reach them at (928) 566-8862 or fffhavasu.com to ask about class levels and enrollment.

samples.user_query: Tell me about Bridge City Combat
samples.assistant_text: Bridge City Combat is a martial arts gym run by founder Christian Beyers, located at 2143 McCulloch Blvd N, Unit B. They're open until 9pm, though I don't have their full weekly schedule confirmed. You'll need to book in person or reach out directly at (928) 716-3009 to get details on classes, pricing, and availability. You can also check them out on Instagram at instagram.com/bridgecitycombat.

route_meta.entity: Bridge City Combat (also: Bridge City Combat & Barry Sullins Jiu-Jitsu)

samples.user_query: Events at Sara Park
samples.assistant_text:
Sara Park's got a solid BMX scene. Here's what's happening:

**Weekly Programs:**
- BMX Practice Tuesday, 5–6:30pm ($5)
- BMX Training Wednesday, 5–6:15pm ($5) — coached skills work
- BMX Racing Thursday, 6–9pm ($10) — USA BMX-sanctioned, registration starts at 6pm
- Mountain Bike Practice Monday, 4:30–6pm (free) — dirt trail racing practice through May

**Upcoming BMX Races:**
April 21, 23, 28, and 30 — all 6–7pm, $10 admission.

All skill levels welcome at practice nights. If you've got a bike and want to jump in, Tuesday or Wednesday are your low-pressure entry points.

samples.user_query: BMX race times
samples.assistant_text:
The catalog has info on local BMX races and practice schedules, but not individual race times or results. Here's what we've got:

We run USA BMX-sanctioned races Thursday nights at SARA Park BMX Track (6–7pm registration, racing starts at 7pm). There are also races scheduled for April 21, 23, 28, and 30, all 6–7pm. Admission's $10.

For actual race times — like who won or what the splits were — you'd need to contact Lake Havasu City BMX directly at (928) 208-5388. They'll have the detailed results and timing data.

samples.user_query: Swimming lessons for beginners
samples.assistant_text: Aqua Beginnings offers swim lessons for beginners at a private heated outdoor pool — check aquabeginnings.com to book and get the pool address.

samples.user_query: Dance classes for a 7-year-old
samples.assistant_text:
I've got recitals and showcases in the catalog, but not the actual dance class listings themselves. The rows show end-of-year performances from ACPA and Footlite School of Dance — both offer multiple styles (ballet, jazz, tap, contemporary) that'd be great for a 7-year-old — but I don't have their class schedules or enrollment info here.

You'll want to contact ACPA or Footlite directly to ask about beginner classes for that age. Both clearly teach kids, so they're solid starting points.

samples.user_query: My son wants to ride mountain bikes. Any classes available?
samples.assistant_text: I don't have mountain bike classes in the catalog. Try the Lake Havasu CVB at https://www.golakehavasu.com/ or search "mountain bike lessons Lake Havasu" to find local instructors or trail guides.

samples.user_query: Underground techno tonight?

samples.user_query: Sonics or Flips for fun for a shy 5-year-old?
samples.assistant_text: Flips for Fun's a solid pick for a shy kid — smaller class sizes tend to feel less overwhelming than bigger gyms, and they're open weekday afternoons (3–8pm) so you can find a quieter time slot. Call (928) 566-8862 to ask about their intro classes or one-on-one options, which often work better for kids who need to warm up to new environments.

samples.user_query: Best place for toddler tumbling

samples.user_query: Compare Footlite and Ballet Havasu for preschool dance

samples.user_query: What should I do Saturday?
samples.assistant_text:
Saturday's got some solid options depending what you're in the mood for.

If you want to bounce around, Altitude Trampoline Park opens at 9am with 90-minute or 120-minute jump sessions ($19–$24). It's a huge 22,000+ sq ft park with trampolines, dodgeball, and more.

For something more chill, Havasu Lanes does open bowling from noon to 9pm, and then switches to Rock & Bowl (cosmic bowling with black lights and party vibes) from 6pm to close. That's a fun Saturday night move.

If you've got kids 6+, The Tap Room Jiu Jitsu runs youth wrestling at 9am.

What sounds good to you?

samples.user_query: Pick one thing to do with kids this weekend
samples.assistant_text: Take the kids to Altitude Trampoline Park on Saturday — they're open 9am–9pm and a 90-minute open jump session is $19. It's the quickest way to burn energy this weekend.
